title: Incident Postmortem Document
shortDescription: Draft a blameless postmortem from incident details with timeline, root cause analysis, and prevention actions.
jobsToBeDone: Document incidents quickly under time pressure
Identify root causes beyond surface symptoms
Define preventive actions that actually get done

inputs.label: Incident Title
inputs.example: Payment Processing Outage — Stripe Webhook Failures

inputs.label: Incident Timeline
inputs.example: 14:02 — alerts fire for failed webhooks. 14:15 — on-call confirms payments stuck in pending. 14:40 — root cause identified: expired API key in prod config. 14:55 — key rotated, webhooks replaying. 15:30 — all queued payments processed, incident resolved.

inputs.label: Customer & Business Impact
inputs.example: ~450 payments delayed 30–90 min. 12 support tickets. No data loss. Estimated revenue delay: $38K (all recovered).

inputs.label: Contributing Factors
inputs.example: API key rotation process is manual. No monitoring on key expiration. Staging uses a different auth path so this wasn't caught in testing.

inputs.label: How Was It Detected
inputs.example: PagerDuty alert on webhook failure rate exceeding 5% threshold
